cards.title: Signal's Whittaker: AI Chatbots Aren't Your Friends
cards.body: Signal president Meredith Whittaker emphasizes that AI chatbots are not conscious beings or sentient interlocutors. She's pushing back against the anthropomorphization of AI systems.

cards.title: Nobel Laureate Jumper Leaves DeepMind for Anthropic
cards.body: John Jumper, a Nobel laureate, is departing Google DeepMind to join rival Anthropic. He joins other prominent researchers leaving the company.

cards.title: US Government Bans Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5
cards.body: The US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models citing national security concerns. Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5's guardrails.

cards.title: Anthropic Ban May Be Boosting the Brand
cards.body: Despite the US government ban on Fable 5 and Mythos 5, market metrics suggest public interest remains strong. The controversy appears to be generating unexpected positive attention.

cards.title: Reliance Integrating AI Across 500M+ Users
cards.body: Billionaire Ambani's Reliance is embedding AI into telecom services reaching over 500 million people. The company is weaving AI into calls, apps, and home devices.

cards.title: Elastic Acquires Deductive AI for Up to $85M
cards.body: Elastic agreed to buy CRV-backed Deductive AI, which uses AI to catch and resolve software bugs. The startup was founded just three years ago.

cards.title: Baseten Raises $1.5B in AI Inference Round
cards.body: AI inference startup Baseten is finalizing a $1.5 billion funding round at a $13 billion valuation. The raise reflects ongoing momentum in the inference sector.

cards.title: Snap Spins Off Dotmo AI Video Company
cards.body: Snapchat is spinning off its AI video team into a new company called Dotmo. The move reflects the company's effort to manage costs while maintaining innovation.

cards.title: OpenAI Adds Talent Ahead of IPO Push
cards.body: OpenAI is hiring Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball. Both additions signal preparation for the company's upcoming IPO.

cards.title: Almost Half of US Singles Reject AI Dating
cards.body: About 47% of US singles view AI negatively in dating contexts, according to Match. However, many are open to AI assistance with profile improvements and conversation starters.

cards.title: Amazon Challenges Nvidia With AI Chip Sales
cards.body: AWS is in talks to sell its AI chips to other data centers, representing a potential $50 billion opportunity. CEO Andy Jassy is pushing the company's direct challenge to Nvidia.

cards.title: FERC Fast-Tracks Data Center Grid Connections
cards.body: Federal regulators mandated that grid operators give data centers priority in interconnection queues. The rule aims to support AI infrastructure growth but doesn't address electricity supply shortages.

cards.title: How to Disable AI in Google Docs
cards.body: Google Docs users can turn off AI features to eliminate unwanted 'write with Gemini' pop-ups. Instructions are now available to manage Gemini's integration.

cards.title: Karamo Brown Launches AI Wellness Clone App
cards.body: 'Queer Eye' life coach Karamo Brown launched Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone. The app covers fitness, meditation, sobriety, and personal growth.

cards.title: General Intuition Raises $300M for Embodied AI
cards.body: General Intuition is in talks to raise $300 million at a $2 billion valuation. The startup trains embodied AI using Medal's dataset of 2 billion videos annually.

cards.title: Signal's Meredith Whittaker: AI Chatbots Aren't Your Friends
cards.body: Signal's leader reminds users that AI chatbots are not conscious beings or sentient interlocutors. They're tools, not friends or companions.

cards.title: Nobel Laureate John Jumper Leaves DeepMind for Anthropic
cards.body: DeepMind's John Jumper, a Nobel laureate, is joining rival Anthropic. This marks another major talent exodus from Google's AI division.

cards.title: US Government Bans Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5
cards.body: The US forced Anthropic to pull two AI models citing national security concerns after researchers found a bypass in Fable 5's guardrails. The ban raises questions about export controls on AI technology.

cards.title: Reliance Weaving AI Into 500M+ User Telecom Services
cards.body: Billionaire Ambani's Reliance is integrating AI across telecom services reaching over 500 million people. The move marks massive AI deployment in emerging markets.

cards.title: Elastic Acquires AI Bug-Detection Startup Deductive AI
cards.body: Elastic agreed to buy Deductive AI for up to $85M, a three-year-old startup using AI to catch and resolve software bugs. The acquisition signals growing demand for AI-powered development tools.

cards.title: AI Inference Startup Baseten Raising $1.5B Round
cards.body: Baseten is reportedly finalizing a $1.5 billion funding round at $13 billion valuation. The mega-round reflects ongoing investor appetite for AI inference infrastructure.

cards.title: Snap Spins Off AI Video Team Into Dotmo
cards.body: Snapchat maker Snap is spinning off its AI video development team into a new company called Dotmo. The move reflects cost pressures in AI video development.

cards.title: OpenAI Recruits Transformer Co-Inventor Before IPO
cards.body: OpenAI hired Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind ahead of its IPO. The company also brought on former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball.

cards.title: 47% of US Singles Negative on AI in Dating
cards.body: Match reports that nearly half of US singles view AI negatively in dating apps. However, many users are open to AI for profile improvements and conversation starters.

cards.title: Amazon Challenges Nvidia by Selling AI Chips
cards.body: AWS is in talks to sell its AI chips to other data centers, representing a potential $50 billion opportunity. The move aims to reduce customer dependence on Nvidia.

cards.title: FERC Fast-Tracks AI Data Center Grid Interconnections
cards.body: The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission gave AI data centers priority access to grid interconnections. However, regulators failed to address underlying electricity supply shortages.

cards.title: How to Disable Google's Gemini AI in Google Docs
cards.body: Google's Gemini AI keeps appearing in Google Docs with pop-up suggestions. Here's how to disable the feature if you'd prefer to work without it.

cards.title: Queer Eye's Karamo Brown Launches AI Wellness App
cards.body: Life coach Karamo Brown launched Kē, a wellness app featuring an AI digital clone of himself. The app guides users through fitness, nutrition, meditation, and personal growth.

cards.title: General Intuition Raises $300M for Embodied AI
cards.body: AI startup General Intuition is in talks to raise $300M at a $2B valuation. The company trains embodied AI using Medal's dataset of 2 billion videos yearly.

cards.title: Subquadratic Claims LLM Bottleneck Breakthrough
cards.body: Miami-based AI startup Subquadratic emerged from stealth claiming it solved a decade-old mathematical bottleneck limiting large language models. Details remain sparse, drawing skepticism from the AI community.
